word: H4280 - מַחֲרָאָה - machărâʼâh - makh-ar-aw-aw' - Draught house

sections.paragraph:
Original: מחראה

Transliteration: machărâ'âh

Phonetic: makh-ar-aw-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. sewer, cesspool, cloaca
  2. (TWOT) draught house

Origin: from the same as H2716

TWOT entry: 730b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
